summary: Phase 2 Job & Offer negotiation system tested end-to-end. All 14 pytest cases passed (100%). Covered: job creation, my/nearby/details listing, full negotiation cycle (offer -> counter -> accept), duplicate-offer prevention, status transitions (open -> negotiating -> accepted), worker assignment, final_price computation, rejection, and blocking offers on accepted jobs.

minor.issue: user_id/worker_id passed as QUERY PARAMETER instead of being derived from auth token. Any client can act as any user (no authorization). Severe security issue but functionally works.
No authorization check - anyone can accept/reject/counter any offer. Should verify caller is the job owner (or worker for accept of a counter).
Returns HTTP 200 on create; conventionally should be 201.
Despite the name, no geolocation filtering is implemented. Returns all open/negotiating jobs not posted by user.
Accepts arbitrary status string with no enum validation; could set status to any value.
OTP returned in response body ('otp' field) - acceptable for dev but must be removed for production.

action_items: (Security) Replace user_id/worker_id query parameters with JWT/session-based authentication so endpoints derive caller identity from token.
(Security) Add authorization checks on /api/offers/{id}/counter|accept|reject so only the job owner (or appropriate party) can mutate offers.
Validate `status` value enum in PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/status using Literal/Pydantic.
Consider returning 201 Created for POST /api/jobs and POST /api/jobs/{id}/offers.
Implement actual geolocation filtering for /api/jobs/nearby (currently just excludes own jobs).
Remove `otp` field from auth response payloads before production deployment.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single file (~720 lines) - approaching the 700-line limit. Plan to split into routers/models modules (auth.py, jobs.py, offers.py, verifications.py).
No authentication middleware - identity is passed as query param everywhere. This is the biggest gap.
Passwords hashed with plain SHA-256 (no salt). Use bcrypt/argon2 for production.
datetime.utcnow() is deprecated in Python 3.12+; prefer datetime.now(timezone.utc).
OTP collection grows unbounded; add TTL index on expires_at.
seed_data_creation: Created test users via register/login fixtures: testuser@example.com (normal_user), mobile 9876543210 (worker), 9876500002 (worker_2), 9876500003 (late worker). Test jobs prefixed with 'TEST_' (Fix leaking sink, Paint house).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 & Phase 2 fully passing. server.py uses query-param user_id (no auth tokens yet). OTP is hardcoded 123456 and is also returned in register/login/send-otp responses. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env (EXPO_BACKEND_URL is not set). Test fixtures in conftest.py handle register-then-login flow and OTP verification automatically.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all targeted Phase 2 endpoints work as expected including negotiation status transitions and final_price selection (counter_offer_price preferred over proposed_price on accept).
